description_long: This wardrobe features a tall, rectangular structure with a dark brown frame and lighter wood-toned panel doors. The front is divided into two main sections: an upper row of four smaller cabinet doors and a lower section with three larger doors, the central one of which is fitted with a vertical mirror. Small, round metallic knobs serve as handles for each door. The sides and top are finished in a uniform dark brown, giving the piece a modern, clean-lined appearance. The back is plain and unadorned, while the front is visually distinguished by the mirror and the contrasting wood tones. This wardrobe is designed for storage and organization, suitable for placement in bedrooms, hallways, or even urban residential entryways.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with a dark brown frame, light wood panel doors, and a central mirrored door. Features metallic knobs and a clean, rectangular silhouette.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, dark brown panel with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four upper cabinet doors, three lower doors with a central mirror, and metallic knobs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain dark brown panel.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, dark brown surface and no visible doors or features.
